title: Shadylex
description: a 16x 1.21.3-1.21.8 purple themed minecraft pvp texture pack
body:
Shadylex is a 16x minecraft pvp texture pack that works on version 1.21.3 up to version 1.21.8
It changes 
- the items like: gapple, pearl, arrow, shield, wind charge
- the tools like: sword, mace, axe, bow, trident, pickaxe
- the texture for the end crystal (in inventory and when placed)
- it makes netherite armor purple
